name: Microwave Hard Candy
recipeIngredient: LorAnn liquid food coloring (as desired, optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix sugar and light corn syrup in a 4-cup microwave-safe glass measure.
2. Cover with plastic wrap.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 3 minutes and 15 seconds.
4. Remove from the microwave and carefully remove plastic wrap.
5. Quickly stir the sugar mixture and then cover with a new sheet of plastic wrap.
6. Microwave on high for 3 minutes and 15 seconds.
7. Remove from microwave, carefully remove plastic wrap, and stir.
8. After boiling has ceased, stir in coloring and then flavoring.
9. Pour syrup quickly, but carefully, onto prepared cookie sheets and foil or into waiting molds.
10. As the sugar mixture begins to set up, score with a large knife to mark squares if desired.
11. Break into pieces when cool.
12. Cool completely.
13. Lightly dust with powdered sugar on both sides, brushing off excess.
14. Break into small pieces.
15. Store in airtight containers between layers of waxed paper.
Please Note: All microwaves are not created equal. This recipe is designed to work in a standard household microwave with a power rating between 600-700 watts. Mini-microwaves and/or commercial microwaves are not recommended.
